achievements.title: First OpenRouter Android Integration
achievements.description: Successfully integrated OpenRouter's multi-model AI API into a native Android application (ChitraAI), enabling access to GPT-4, Claude, and Stable Diffusion through a single interface.
achievements.impact: Demonstrated advanced API integration skills combining mobile development with cutting-edge AI technology.

achievements.title: Production ERP Deployment
achievements.description: Developed and deployed a full-stack ERP system for Hariom Machinery, handling real inventory, billing, and customer data in a production environment.
achievements.impact: Gained real-world experience in requirement gathering, development, testing, and deployment of business-critical software.

achievements.title: Complex Multi-Role Architecture
achievements.description: Designed and implemented a multi-role authentication and authorization system for a school management platform supporting four distinct user types with granular permissions.
achievements.impact: Mastered role-based access control (RBAC) patterns and secure session management in PHP.

achievements.title: Tech Hackathon Participant
achievements.description: Participated in inter-college hackathons, building functional prototypes within time constraints and presenting technical solutions to judges.
achievements.impact: Developed rapid prototyping skills and experience presenting under pressure.

achievements.title: Prompt Engineering Specialization
achievements.description: Developed deep expertise in prompt engineering, including system prompt design, few-shot learning, context injection, and response formatting for production AI applications.
achievements.impact: Enables building of sophisticated AI-powered features including the YugAI career twin itself.
